objective: Fix bootstrap .env.shared discovery when scripts run from sibling governance worktrees.
scope_boundary: Modify bootstrap vault discovery, focused contract tests, issue #419 planning/validation/closeout artifacts, and generated graph/wiki artifacts.
Do not commit .env.shared or generated repo-local env files.
research_summary: Post-merge verification for #416 proved that a sibling governance worktree could not find the primary .env.shared vault. The intended SSOT remains the primary hldpro-governance checkout.

sprints.name: Sibling worktree SSOT discovery
sprints.goal: Allow bootstrap scripts to resolve the primary governance vault from sibling worktrees.
tasks: Add sibling primary checkout fallback to bootstrap vault discovery.
Validate bootstrap from the synced main worktree.
Open PR, wait for checks, merge, and close #419.
acceptance_criteria: Sibling governance worktrees resolve the primary hldpro-governance .env.shared vault.
Nested worktree and primary checkout behavior remains unchanged.
Validation does not print secret values or phone numbers.
Final AC: GitHub PR checks pass before merge.

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify sibling worktree vault discovery stays scoped and redacted.
specialist_reviews.summary: Accepted a focused fallback to the sibling primary governance checkout.

alternate_model_review.summary: Small post-merge bugfix under the existing #416 validation lane.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #419 may update bootstrap discovery, focused tests, and issue artifacts only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Validate, open PR, merge after checks pass, and regenerate local-ai-machine env from merged main.

material_deviation_rules: If vault discovery requires hardcoding a user secret path, stop and redesign.
If validation output includes values, redact and rerun.
